Gmcm.Keybind.Name: Animation-Cancel Key
Gmcm.Keybind.Tooltip: Which key to press to cancel the current animation.
Gmcm.Suppression.Name: Default Input Suppression
Gmcm.Suppression.Tooltip: When to suppress the default behavior of the {{ keybindName }}, if it has any other in-game function.
Gmcm.CancelDelay.Name: Cancel Delay (ms)
Gmcm.CancelDelay.Tooltip: How many milliseconds to wait after starting a tool use before cancelling the animation. Lower values are faster but may cancel before the tool effect registers.
